valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete component schedule; preserve the range and evidence block until every material assumption is reconciled.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Every currently identified material ownership claim, liability, and option is valued once. Unknown claims remain an evidence blocker, not an unvalued line item.

valuation.evidence: FY2025 segment and balance-sheet bridge via NUE/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json; proof base 110.0/sh via midcycle_capacity_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Normalize shipments, spread, utilization, maintenance capital, and tax across a full steel cycle rather than capitalizing 2025 or spot margins.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: 230.9 million diluted shares in FY2025 results

assumptions.label: Through-cycle capitalization multiple on segment pretax per share
assumptions.rationale: Converts filing segment pretax into per-share economic value after normalizing utilization, spread, maintenance capital, tax, and corporate allocation across a full steel cycle; not peak-2025 capitalization.

calculations.label: Steel mills through-cycle value per share

valuation.evidence: FY2025 segment and balance-sheet bridge via NUE/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json; proof base 65.0/sh via midcycle_capacity_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Value downstream earnings separately using normalized backlog, margins, and maintenance capital.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: 230.9 million diluted shares in FY2025 results

assumptions.label: Through-cycle capitalization multiple on segment pretax per share
assumptions.rationale: Converts filing segment pretax into per-share economic value after normalizing utilization, spread, maintenance capital, tax, and corporate allocation across a full steel cycle; not peak-2025 capitalization.

calculations.label: Steel products through-cycle value per share

valuation.evidence: FY2025 segment and balance-sheet bridge via NUE/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json; proof base 8.0/sh via midcycle_capacity_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Use through-cycle DRI, scrap, and brokerage economics after sustaining capital.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: 230.9 million diluted shares in FY2025 results

assumptions.label: Through-cycle capitalization multiple on segment pretax per share
assumptions.rationale: Converts filing segment pretax into per-share economic value after normalizing utilization, spread, maintenance capital, tax, and corporate allocation across a full steel cycle; not peak-2025 capitalization.

calculations.label: Raw materials through-cycle value per share

valuation.evidence: FY2025 segment and balance-sheet bridge via NUE/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json; proof base -19.0/sh via net_asset_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Deduct all debt and finance leases net of cash and short-term investments; range reflects required operating liquidity.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: 230.9 million diluted shares in FY2025 results
Year-end cash and short-term investments $2.699 billion

assumptions.label: Additional operating liquidity retained above filing net debt
assumptions.rationale: Low case keeps extra liquidity inside the enterprise; high case assumes surplus cash above working-capital needs.

calculations.label: Net debt claim per share (senior to equity)

valuation.evidence: FY2025 segment and balance-sheet bridge via NUE/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json; proof base 25.0/sh via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Credit only probability-weighted after-tax cash returns above the cost of capital, net of remaining spend and ramp losses.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: 230.9 million diluted shares in FY2025 results

inputs.label: West Virginia sheet mill net project cost

source.locator: West Virginia sheet mill expected to cost about $3.65 billion net of state commitment

inputs.label: West Virginia sheet mill annual capacity

source.locator: West Virginia sheet mill to provide about 3 million tons of annual capacity
2025 pre-operating and start-up costs approximately $496 million

assumptions.label: Probability-weighted incremental value net of remaining spend and ramp losses
assumptions.rationale: Credits only after-tax returns above the cost of capital on disclosed projects (West Virginia sheet, Kentucky plate ramp, Arizona melt shop, towers, coatings) after deducting remaining owner-funded spend not yet in normalized segment earnings.

assumptions.label: Remaining project spend deducted inside the option proof
assumptions.rationale: Owner-funded completion and ramp spend still ahead of mature utilization.

calculations.label: Risked incremental project value per share

valuation.evidence: FY2025 segment and balance-sheet bridge via NUE/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json; proof base -10.0/sh via midcycle_capacity_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Explicitly deduct for margin mean reversion, supply response, and projects earning below their cost of capital.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

assumptions.label: Explicit downcycle reserve for supply response and margin mean reversion
assumptions.rationale: Deducts for domestic/global capacity additions, import pressure, and projects that may earn below their cost of capital; kept separate from normalized segment multiples to avoid double-counting cyclical risk.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of NUE, including every identified operating claim, asset, liability, and option.
economic_claim.unit_source: Nucor FY2025 results: 230.9m diluted shares, segment pretax income of $2.383bn steel mills, $1.229bn steel products, and $153m raw materials; $2.699bn cash/investments and $7.121bn debt/lease obligations.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are included as separate components or within the stated equity basis.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Nucor FY2025 results: 230.9m diluted shares, segment pretax income of $2.383bn steel mills, $1.229bn steel products, and $153m raw materials; $2.699bn cash/investments and $7.121bn debt/lease obligations.

component_groups.label: Steel mills through-cycle value
component_groups.valuation_basis: Normalize shipments, spread, utilization, maintenance capital, and tax across a full steel cycle rather than capitalizing 2025 or spot margins.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key steel_mills; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Downstream steel products
component_groups.valuation_basis: Value downstream earnings separately using normalized backlog, margins, and maintenance capital.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key steel_products; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Raw materials and recycling
component_groups.valuation_basis: Use through-cycle DRI, scrap, and brokerage economics after sustaining capital.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key raw_materials; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Net debt and lease claims
component_groups.valuation_basis: Deduct all debt and finance leases net of cash and short-term investments; range reflects required operating liquidity.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key net_debt_and_leases; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: New-project ramp and replacement-cost optionality
component_groups.valuation_basis: Credit only probability-weighted after-tax cash returns above the cost of capital, net of remaining spend and ramp losses.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key new_project_ramp; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

component_groups.label: Supply-response and downcycle reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Explicitly deduct for margin mean reversion, supply response, and projects earning below their cost of capital.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key supply_response_and_downcycle_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

wisdom_applied: Marathon/Capital Returns: supply response and reinvestment determine normalized value.
Howard Marks/Oaktree: liquidity and debt must survive the low case.
Greenblatt: segment separation prevents a blended multiple from hiding weak capital allocation.
limitations: Starter ranges are analyst estimates, not committee-approved price targets.
The model remains evidence-blocked until primary-source normalization, comparable selection, and downside cases pass independent review.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

ownership_waterfall.net_economic_claim: One diluted Nucor share claim on through-cycle steel mills, downstream products, raw materials, net debt, risked project ramp, and an explicit supply-response reserve.
excluded_claims: Corporate eliminations and startup losses are allocated inside segment normalization or the project option, not additive twice.
Supply-response reserve is separate from segment multiples to control overlap.
ownership_waterfall.reconciliation: FY2025 segment pretax $2.383B mills + $1.229B products + $153M raw materials; cash $2.699B and debt/leases $7.121B; component proofs sum to legacy base $179/sh.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Steel mills through-cycle value
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

falsifiers: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.
